base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of stalfos_walk — a character from 1986 legend of zelda. Stalfos — skeleton warrior. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Stalfos — skeleton warrior; 2-frame walk; melee attack
